chunk_text: Each row has a channel name on the left and programs on that channel on the right.. In the Guide , use the up and down directional buttons to move between channels and use the left and right. directional buttons to move between programs at different times within a channel.. You can also use the or button to enter a channel number and go to that channel directly. You can use the. button to move to the program currently broadcasting.. When you move the focus to a program, you will hear detailed information about the selected program. When you. move the focus to a different channel, you will hear the channel name and number, and the program details. If you. move to a different day, you will hear the day announced for the first program you reach on that day. The day is not. repeated, so if you are not sure what the day is, you can move forwards and backwards 24 hours and then the day. will be announced.

original_question: How do you switch from the Guide to live TV on a selected channel?
original_answer: Move to the program currently broadcasting in the Guide, and then press the Select button.

provenance.chunk: To view a program on now (chunk 0)

chunk_text:
In the Guide , move to the program currently broadcasting, and then press the Select button to go to live TV on the
selected channel and program.

original_question: How can you identify which programs are set up for scheduled viewing?
original_answer: The icon appears next to programs that have been configured for a schedule viewing.

provenance.chunk: Using Schedule Viewing (chunk 0)

chunk_text:
Configure the TV to show a specific channel or program at a specific time and date.

The icon appears next to programs that have been configured for a schedule viewing.

original_question: How do I set up scheduled viewing on two screens using the Guide Screen?
original_answer: On the Guide screen, select a program you would like to view and press the Select button. Then, select Schedule Viewing from the pop-up menu that appears.

provenance.chunk: Setting up a schedule viewing (chunk 0)

chunk_text:
You can set up a schedule viewing on two screens.

• The Guide Screen

On the Guide screen, select a program you would like to view, and then press the Select button. Select Schedule
Viewing on the pop-up menu that appears.

• The Program Info Screen

Press the Select button while watching the TV. The Program Info window appears. Select a broadcast scheduled
program by using the left or right directional buttons, and then press the Select button. You can schedule a
reminder to watch the program by selecting Schedule Viewing .

original_question: How do I cancel a scheduled viewing from the Guide?
original_answer: Press the channel button to access the Guide, move to the program and press Select, then move to Cancel Scheduled Viewing and press Select again. When the pop-up message appears, select Yes.

provenance.chunk: Cancelling a scheduled viewing (chunk 0)

chunk_text:
You have 2 ways to cancel a scheduled viewing.

• Cancelling a scheduled viewing from the Guide

1. Press the (channel) button to access the Guide .
2. Move to to the program to cancel the viewing schedule, and press the Select button.
3. Move to Cancel Scheduled Viewing , and then press the Select button.
4. When a pop-up message asking you to cancel the selected scheduled viewing appears, select Yes . The
scheduled viewing is canceled and the Guide screen appears.

• Cancelling a scheduled viewing from Schedule Manager or Recordings

1. On the remote control, press the or button.
2. Use the directional buttons to move to the control pad.
3. Press the Select button to open Schedule Manager or Recordings .

If the TV supports the Recordings function, press the directional buttons to move to Schedules .
4. Press the up directional button to move to the Schedules option.
5. Use the down directional button to move to the list of programs scheduled to view.
6. Use the right directional button to move to the Delete option, and then press the Select button to delete the
selected item.

original_question: How do you select between the 'Air' and 'Cable' settings in the Category List?
original_answer: To select 'Air or Cable', move the focus to that option using the up and down directional buttons, then press the Select button.

provenance.chunk: Using the Channel List (chunk 0)

chunk_text: See how to list the channels available on your TV.. Using Channel List , you can change the channel or check programs on other digital channels while watching TV.. The focus is on the channel you are currently watching, and the name and number of the channel, along with the program. title, are displayed.. Use the up and down directional buttons to move within the channel list (or use the (Channel) button to go up. and down a page at a time). You can also use the or button to enter a channel number and go to that channel. directly.. Press the left directional button in the Channel List to move to the Category List. Use the up and down directional. buttons to move within this list. Press the Select button to choose a category you want from the Category List. The. Category List contains All , Favorites , Samsung TV Plus , and Air or Cable . Use the up and down directional buttons to. move to a channel you want to view, and then press the Select button.. • Air or Cable. To select Air or Cable , move the focus to Air or Cable , and then press the Select button. Air is suitable for. homes equipped with separate, over-the-air antennas. Cable is suitable for homes that subscribe to a local. cable-service, but do not have a cable box. You do not need to use this function if your TV is connected to a cable. box or satellite box.. This function may not be supported depending on the incoming broadcast signal.. Displays the channels that have been automatically searched.. These are the channels your TV will receive either over the air if your TV is set to Air or over cable if your TV is set to. Cable . See Air or Cable below..

original_question: How do I view only the channels contained within a specific favorites list?
original_answer: Use the up and down directional buttons to move between the lists of favorites, highlight the one you want, and then press the Select button.

provenance.chunk: Using the Channel List (chunk 1)

chunk_text: See Air or Cable below.. While the TV is connected to the network, you can watch popular programs or highlights for each theme. through a virtual channel at any time. As with regular channels, the TV provides the daily program schedules for. Samsung TV Plus .. Displays Favorites , My List 1 to My List 4 . Use the up and down directional buttons to move between the lists of. favorites. Highlight the one you want, and then press the Select button. The channel list will now show only the. channels in this list.

original_question: What should be done regarding precautions before starting the procedure for recording a program to an external hard drive connected via USB?
original_answer: Read all precautions before using the recording feature.

provenance.chunk: Recording (chunk 0)

chunk_text:
Recording a program to an external hard drive connected via USB.

Read all precautions before using the recording feature. For more information, refer to "Before Using the Recording and
Timeshift Functions."

original_question: How do you stop an ongoing recording?
original_answer: Press the down directional button while the program being recorded is displayed, move the focus to Stop Recording in the control bar that appears, and then press the Select button.

provenance.chunk: Using the instant and schedule recording options from the guide screen: (chunk 0)

chunk_text:
To record a program that is on now, open the Guide by pressing the (channel) button, move to the program,
and then press the Select button. You will get a pop-up menu. Use the up and down directional buttons to move
to Record . Press the Select button to record the program. You will be returned to the program guide. Recording
automatically ends at the time when the program ends.

To stop recording, press the down directional button while the program being recorded is displayed. The control
bar appears. Move the focus to Stop Recording , and then press the Select button. When a pop-up window appears,
Stop . select

To record a program that is on later, move to the program in the Guide , and then press the Select button. You
will get a pop-up menu. Use the up and down directional button to move within this menu. Move to the Schedule
Recording , and then press the Select button. You will hear a message saying the program has been set to record
and then you will be returned to the program guide.

The icon is placed visually next to the program title to show it is set to record. To find out if a program is set
to record or to cancel a scheduled recording, press the Select button on the program. If it is already set to record,
then the option on the menu will be Cancel Scheduled Recording . You can press the Select button to cancel the
scheduled recording or just press the button to go back to the program guide without cancelling the recording.

original_question: How do I display the menu for recording a program or starting the Timeshift function?
original_answer: Press the button twice or press the button while watching the program.

provenance.chunk: Recording the program you are watching (chunk 0)

chunk_text:
To display a menu for recording a program or starting the Timeshift function, press the button twice or press the
button while watching the program. You can select the following functions on the menu:

Immediately starts to record the program you are watching.

• Timeshift

Starts the Timeshift function.

Stops the recording or the Timeshift function that is running.

Displays the details about the program you ware watching.

original_question: How do you schedule a recording for a broadcast scheduled program?
original_answer: Press the Select button while viewing a program to display the program info window, use the left and right directional buttons to select the desired program, press the Select button again, and then choose Schedule Recording.

provenance.chunk: Scheduling recording from the program info window (chunk 0)

chunk_text:
Press the Select button while viewing a program to display the program info window. In the program info window,
use the left and right directional buttons to select a broadcast scheduled program, and then press the Select
button. To schedule a recording for the program, select Schedule Recording .

original_question: How do I specify how long to record for when recording a live program?
original_answer: Press the down directional button to display the control bar, use left or right buttons to move to Edit Recording Time and press Select. Use left and right buttons with the slider scale to change the time, then press Select again.

provenance.chunk: Changing the recording time (chunk 0)

chunk_text:
When recording a live program you can specify how long you want to record for.

Press the down directional button to display the control bar at the bottom. Press the left or right directional buttons
to move to Edit Recording Time , and then press the Select button. A slider scale appears and you will hear the
recording time currently set. Use the left and right directional buttons to change the time, and then press the Select
button. You will hear a menu that gives information about the recording time. To return to the program you are
watching, press the button on the remote.

The maximum recording time differs depending on the capacity of the USB device.

original_question: How do you navigate between program titles?
original_answer: Use the up and down directional buttons to move between program titles.

provenance.chunk: Viewing recorded programs (chunk 0)

chunk_text:
2. Use the directional buttons to move to the control pad.

To play a program, use the up and down directional buttons to move between program titles. Press the Select
button to play the program or press the right directional button to move to a list of options. Use the up and down
directional buttons to move between the options in this list. You can play, remove, delete the program, or view the
program details.

Select the Play option to play the program. The program will start. If you have watched part of this program before,
you will get a pop-up menu on screen allowing you to Play (from start), Continue Playing (from where you left
off), or Cancel . Use the left and right directional buttons to move to the required option, and then press the Select
button.

original_question: How do I navigate from the recording options menu to select the Delete function?
original_answer: Press the down directional button to move to the Delete option, and then press the Select button.

provenance.chunk: Deleting a recorded program (chunk 0)

chunk_text:
You can delete any recorded program.

1. Go to the list of Recordings to delete a recorded program.

2. Use the up and down directional buttons to move to the recording you want to delete.

3. Press the right directional button to move to a list of 3 options.

4. Press the down directional button to move to the Delete option, and then press the Select button.

You will be asked if you want to remove the selected item.

5. Press the left directional button to move to the Delete button, and then press the Select button to delete the
program title.

The program will be deleted and you will be returned to the list of Recordings .

original_question: What can you learn to do using the Smart Hub?
original_answer: Learn how to use Smart Hub to access apps, games, movies, and more.

provenance.chunk: Using Smart Hub (chunk 0)

chunk_text: Learn how to use Smart Hub to access apps, games, movies, and more.

original_question: How do you navigate to other items after being redirected to the Home Screen?
original_answer: Move the focus to the top of the Smart Hub Home Screen and then use the directional buttons to move the focus to other items.

provenance.chunk: Smart Hub (chunk 0)

chunk_text:
Use a variety of Smart Hub content offered by your Samsung TV.

Some Smart Hub services are for pay services.

Smart Hub service outages can be caused by disruptions in your Internet service.

Press the button. You are redirected to the Home Screen of the content you are currently using. Move the focus
to the top of the Smart Hub Home Screen and then use the directional buttons to move the focus to other items.

Use a variety of Smart Hub content, as follows: Samsung Account , Search , Connected Devices , , Vision AI
Companion , For You , Live , Games , Ambient or Art , Daily , Apps , Privacy Choices

Supported Smart Hub content may vary depending on the model and geographical area.

original_question: How do you return to TV mode from Ambient mode?
original_answer: To return to TV mode from Ambient mode, double-press the button.

provenance.chunk: Using the Smart Hub Home Screen (chunk 0)

chunk_text:
At the very top of the Smart Hub Home Screen are the following fixed menus. You can quickly and easily use the
listed menu items to access the main TV settings or external devices, search, and apps.

• Samsung Account

• Search

• Connected Devices


• Vision AI Companion

• For You

• Ambient / Art

– Ambient

To return to TV mode from Ambient mode, double-press the button. Press the button to turn off the
TV.

– Art

• Live

• Games


• Daily

• Apps

• Privacy Choices

original_question: How can I access the embedded user manual for my TV?
original_answer: You can open the user manual by accessing it directly from your TV or by downloading a copy of the User Guide from Samsung's website.

provenance.chunk: Launching the User Guide (chunk 0)

chunk_text:
Open the user manual embedded in your TV.

You can view the embedded User Guide containing information about your TV's key features.

Alternatively, you can download a copy of the User Guide from Samsung's website (https://www.samsung.com).

The User Guide's Home Screen contains 1 row of menu icons. Use the left and right directional buttons to move
within a row. Press the Select button to open the section you want to read.

You can use the directional buttons on the remote control to use the functions on the top such as Search , Sitemap , and
Index .

The User Guide contains a section called " Learn TV Remote " in " Accessibility Guidance ". This is particularly useful
for people who cannot easily see the buttons on the control or who are not clear what each button does. When you
are viewing this section of the User Guide, pressing the buttons on the remote control will not affect the TV.

original_question: How do you use Bixby to control your TV?
original_answer: To use Bixby, press and hold the button on the Samsung Smart Remote, say a command into the microphone on the remote, and then release the button.

provenance.chunk: Using Bixby (chunk 0)

chunk_text:
Set Voice Assistant to Bixby. A guide to using Bixby to control your TV.

To use Bixby, your TV must be connected to the network and you must use the microphone on your Samsung Smart
Remote.

To use Bixby, press and hold the button on the Samsung Smart Remote, say a command into the microphone on
the remote, and then release the button to run Bixby.

The existing functional specifications may be changed if Bixby is updated.

The supported language may differ depending on the geographical area.

original_question: How do you activate listening mode and issue a voice command using the Samsung Smart Remote?
original_answer: Press and hold the button on the remote until the Bixby icon appears at the bottom of the TV screen, say your command while holding it, then release the button.

provenance.chunk: Running Bixby (chunk 0)

chunk_text:
Press and hold the button on the Samsung Smart Remote. Bixby is activated in the listening mode, the Bixby
icon appears at the bottom of the TV screen. Say a command, and then release the button. The TV provides feedback
on how it understands the command, and then performs the commanded task.

If the TV does not understand the command, try again with more precise pronunciation.

You can find a detailed description of the voice commands at Discover Bixby . Press the button. The icon appears at
the bottom right of the screen. Press the Select button to go to the Discover Bixby screen.
